highRelevance.headline: Assigned Commissioner's Amended Phase 3B Scoping Memo and Ruling.  Opening comments are due on August 14, 2026, and reply comments are due on August 21, 2026. The scope of this proceeding is amended as described above and is adopted. The schedule of this proceeding is set forth above and is adopted. Evidentiary hearings are not needed. The category of the proceeding remains quasi-legislative. Commissioner Darcie L. Houck is the presiding officer. Investor-owned utilities shall and other parties may file and serve responses to the questions set forth in this ruling no later than August 14, 2026. Parties may file and serve reply comments no later than August 21, 2026.
